name: oww-maco
description: IoT machine authentication system - dev orchestration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n emu,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:emulators" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test:web:integration: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.e2e.json --only firestore 'cd web && npm run test:integration'
scripts.test:web:e2e: firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.e2e.json --only firestore,auth,functions 'cd web && npm run test:e2e'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:web && cd functions && npm test
